description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the alpine Docker image and a before_script installing openssl and curl via apk. Define five jobs each limited to a specific branch: develop (only on develop) runs curl -X POST -F token=$CI_JOB_TOKEN -F ref=staging https://gitlab.com/api/v4/projects/3536382/trigger/pipeline and then curl -X POST -F token=$CI_JOB_TOKEN -F ref=review https://gitlab.com/api/v4/projects/3536382/trigger/pipeline; master (only on master) runs curl -X POST -F token=$CI_JOB_TOKEN -F ref=develop https://gitlab.com/api/v4/projects/3536382/trigger/pipeline; production (only on production) runs echo OK; review (only on review) runs curl -X POST -F token=$CI_JOB_TOKEN -F ref=production https://gitlab.com/api/v4/projects/3536382/trigger/pipeline; staging (only on staging) runs echo OK. All jobs inherit the before_script, and no caches, artifacts, services, or deployment targets are defined.
